title: PERJURY EVIDENCE COMPILER
subtitle: Emily Watson's False Sworn Statements — Impeachment Ready

elements: Statement was material to the matter
Defendant knew it was false when made
legal_standard.civil_use: MCR 2.612(C)(1)(c) — Relief from judgment for fraud

categories.description: Emily's sworn claims of violence/threats — contradicted by evidence

instances.claim: Straw incident (Oct 2023) — alleged Andrew was violent/threatening
instances.contradicted_by: No police report, no witnesses, no injuries documented
Continued voluntary contact with Andrew after alleged incidents
Andrew visiting child at known locations is parental right, not stalking

categories.description: Emily's sworn claims about Andrew's unfitness — contradicted by reality

instances.contradicted_by: Andrew was primary caregiver — documented by pediatrician records, daycare records
Zero CPS findings against Andrew, zero police reports of child endangerment

instances.claim: Andrew does not provide stable environment
instances.contradicted_by: Andrew maintained consistent residence at 1977 Whitehall Road throughout

categories.description: Emily's claims of cooperating with court — contradicted by actions

instances.contradicted_by: Systematically blocked ALL contact since Aug 2025 suspension

instances.claim: Following court orders in good faith
instances.contradicted_by: Using court orders as weapon to eliminate Andrew's parenting time

categories.description: Emily's financial claims — potentially false for support calculations

instances.contradicted_by: Discovery needed to verify — motion to compel may reveal discrepancies
Berry appears to be cohabiting and contributing — affects support calculation
